issue_title: Chart tooltip shows raw metric name instead of label

structured_output.root_cause_analysis: Tooltip formatter read `metric.name` instead of the verbose `metric.label`.
structured_output.resolution_summary: Prefer the human label in the tooltip, fall back to the name.

file_changes.change_summary: Use verbose metric label in tooltip.

worklog.message: Investigate and fix issue #9005: Chart tooltip shows raw metric name instead of label
Reproduced the issue, identified the root cause and opened a PR. Prefer the human label in the tooltip, fall back to the name.
